meta.provider: Dorfkorporation Schwarzenbach SG, Elektrizität Wasser Gas TV
meta.notes: Swiss household electricity tariff — ElCom reference profile H4 (~4,500 kWh/yr), basic/standard supply (Grundversorgung) — from the Federal Electricity Commission (ElCom) via LINDAS (lindas.admin.ch). opendata.swiss "Open use" (terms_open); ElCom attributed as a courtesy. All-in 27.26 Rp/kWh = energy 11.90 + grid 11.46 + federal grid surcharge 2.30 + community/cantonal taxes; annual fixed 60 CHF. Serves 1 municipality. Period 2026.
